Arcane Orb: Orbs become Chaos orbs, dealing 40% increased damage. Chaos Orbs gain 15% increased damage for every additional orb. Chaos orbs have a 10% chance to cause an Arcane burst when returning to the player.

Fiery Totems: Creates a Wall of Fire in front of the player that deals 33% damage three times per second.
